race.comment: IT'S A WRITTEN (6) was out of the money when resuming from a spell last start over 1200m at Scone, beaten 4 lengths. Has a fair record when second up, including two top-three finishes. Finds the right race this time and can get the job done. SKY BLUE (4) continued the encouraging form and wasn't far away last time when third over 1200m at Esk. Don't underestimate. FINAL VOYAGE (5) made progress last time out, finishing 3.5 lengths from the winner in third at the end of 1200m at Kilcoy. Has the class to build on that encouraging effort last start. REPRISAL (2) has been out of the winner's list for a long time, last start finishing sixth at Tamworth over 1200m after he got a long way back in the run. Likely improver who should be about the mark.
